ddls:
CREATE TABLE "treatment_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment process */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the process is executed */,
  "process_category" TEXT /* Category of the treatment process (e.g., primary, secondary, tertiary) */,
  "process_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the treatment process (e.g., filtration, disinfection) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the process was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the process was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_processes_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., water treatment plant, wastewater treatment plant) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the facility (e.g., gallons per day) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the chemical */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the chemical in stock */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the chemical */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the chemical */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_chemicals" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment process */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the chemical used in the process */,
  "dosage_rate" REAL /* Dosage rate of the chemical in the process */,
  "dosage_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dosage rate (e.g., mg/L, ppm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id", "chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment process */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the water quality parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was measured */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  "limit" REAL /* Regulatory limit for the parameter */,
  "limit_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the regulatory limit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_quality_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES treatment_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_resources" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment process */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the resource used in the process */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., physical, electrical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource in stock */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the resource */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the resource */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, supervisor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment process */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES treatment_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment process */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES treatment_processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was scheduled */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the equipment is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "warranty_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment warranty expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibrations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was earned */,
  "certification_type" TEXT /* Type of certification */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance record was created */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance record (e.g., pending, compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)
